items.title: 3 crypto attacks in 24 hours – From fake apps to a $14.2M SOL theft
items.whyYouShouldCare: Recent attacks, including a significant theft of $14.2M in SOL, highlight vulnerabilities in the ecosystem that could impact user trust and liquidity.

items.title: One crypto wallet tied to a 20-year-old fraudster processed over $122M before Interpol closed in
items.whyYouShouldCare: The closure of a wallet linked to extensive fraud raises concerns about security and regulatory scrutiny, which could affect the overall crypto market dynamics.

items.title: Signs of life?: State of Crypto
items.whyYouShouldCare: Emerging signs of recovery in the crypto market could influence investor sentiment and potentially enhance activity within the Solana ecosystem.
